verdict: Mineral sunscreen moisturizer hybrid with physical blockers and light hydration. Good for sun protection but less moisturizing than dedicated hydrating products.

_research.name: Neutrogena Ultra Sheer Daily Moisturizer SPF 30
pros: SPF 30 protection with no chemical actives
Lightweight formula suitable for daily use
_research.con: Physical blockers can leave white cast; less hydrating than specialized moisturizers.
